scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../worker && cargo install -q 'worker-build@^0.8' && worker-build --release

OIDC_ISSUER_URL.description: Base URL of your OIDC provider, for example `https://auth.example.com`.

OIDC_CLIENT_ID.description: OIDC client ID registered for Flaremask.

OIDC_REDIRECT_URI.description: Callback URL for this Worker, for example `https://flaremask.<your-subdomain>.workers.dev/auth/callback`.

CF_ZONE_ID.description: Cloudflare Zone ID for the domain where Email Routing is enabled.

CF_EMAIL_DOMAIN.description: Optional domain name for Email Routing, such as `example.com`. Setting this avoids an extra zone lookup.

TOKEN_EXPIRY.description: Session lifetime in seconds. The default is `3600`.

OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET.description: OIDC client secret from your identity provider.

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.description: Cloudflare API token with `Email Routing Rules: Edit` and optionally `Zone: Read` for the selected zone.

JWT_SECRET.description: Random secret used to sign sessions. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32`.
